injuries.comment: Cernak did not play in Tuesday's (Nov. 18) game against the Devils and is considered as day-to-day.
The Oilers said on Wednesday (Nov. 19) that Philp will miss Edmonton's next three games due to an upper-body injury, per Bob Stauffer of the Oilers Radio Network.

The Oilers said on Wednesday (Nov. 19) that Lazar sustained an upper-body injury that will sideline him for the remaining three games of the Oilers' road trip, per Bob Stauffer of the Oilers Radio Network.
